recommendations.overview: A widowed professor living in Paris develops a special relationship with a younger French woman.

recommendations.overview: Teodoro, a Spanish engineer working as a professor in the United States, returns to Spain to enjoy a sabbatical year.

recommendations.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
recommendations.overview: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic, but things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people.

recommendations.overview: An Edinburgh professor and assorted colleagues follow an explorer's trail down an extinct Icelandic volcano to the earth's center.

recommendations.title: The Gold Rush
recommendations.overview: A gold prospector in Alaska struggles to survive the elements and win the heart of a dance hall girl.
